title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a cooking class.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: How was your first cooking class? || Man: Good fun. I thought we'd make something complicated, but the teacher chose simple dishes. [8]I liked that we worked in pairs, because I could ask another student for help when I wasn't sure what to do[/8]. || Woman: That sounds less stressful than cooking alone in front of everyone. || Woman: I might ask someone else as well, just to be sure, but at least I have a much better idea now.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How was your first cooking class?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good fun. I thought we'd make something complicated, but the teacher chose simple dishes. I liked that we worked in pairs, because I could ask another student for help when I wasn't sure what to do.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds less stressful than cooking alone in front of everyone.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I might ask someone else as well, just to be sure, but at least I have a much better idea now.

questions.question: What did the man like about the cooking class?
questions.explanation: He says he liked working in pairs because he could ask another student for help.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a bus tour.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you enjoy the city bus tour? || Woman: It was okay. The guide was funny, and I learned a few facts. [9]But the bus windows were dirty, so it was hard to take good photos from upstairs[/9]. || Man: That's annoying when the whole point is seeing the city. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out. It sounds as if you have thought about it carefully, which is always a sensible start. || Woman: That should make the choice easier now.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you enjoy the city bus tour?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: It was okay. The guide was funny, and I learned a few facts. But the bus windows were dirty, so it was hard to take good photos from upstairs.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's annoying when the whole point is seeing the city.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out. It sounds as if you have thought about it carefully, which is always a sensible start.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That should make the choice easier now.

questions.question: What was the problem with the bus tour?
questions.explanation: She says the bus windows were dirty, making it difficult to take photos.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about a football club.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Are you still volunteering at the junior football club? || Man: Yes. The children are great, although they have so much energy. [10]We need more adults to help on match days, especially when two teams play at the same time[/10]. || Woman: I could ask my brother. He used to coach a school team. || Woman: Maybe next time it will be simpler. Things like this often seem more difficult before you know the full story.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Are you still volunteering at the junior football club?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. The children are great, although they have so much energy. We need more adults to help on match days, especially when two teams play at the same time.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I could ask my brother. He used to coach a school team.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe next time it will be simpler. Things like this often seem more difficult before you know the full story.

questions.question: What does the club need?
questions.explanation: The man says they need more adults to help on match days.

extracts.context: You will hear a girl talking about a school project.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Have you finished your history project? || Girl: Almost. I found lots of information online and wrote most of it last night. [11]Today I only need to choose the pictures and put them in the right places[/11]. || Man: That shouldn't take too long. Remember to check the spelling before you print it. || Man: I agree. It is worth taking a little time over it, instead of rushing and regretting the choice later. || Man: At least the main point is clear.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Have you finished your history project?

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: Almost. I found lots of information online and wrote most of it last night. Today I only need to choose the pictures and put them in the right places.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That shouldn't take too long. Remember to check the spelling before you print it.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I agree. It is worth taking a little time over it, instead of rushing and regretting the choice later.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: At least the main point is clear.

questions.question: What does the girl still need to do?
questions.explanation: She says she only needs to choose the pictures and put them in the right places.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a new cinema.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you been to the new cinema yet? || Man: Yes. The seats are comfortable, and the sound is excellent. Tickets are a bit expensive, though. [12]What bothered me was the lack of staff at the entrance; everyone had to wait to show their tickets[/12]. || Woman: They should sort that out before it gets busy. || Woman: That makes sense. Sometimes the practical details are more important than they seem at the beginning. || Woman: That is worth remembering next time too.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you been to the new cinema yet?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. The seats are comfortable, and the sound is excellent. Tickets are a bit expensive, though. What bothered me was the lack of staff at the entrance; everyone had to wait to show their tickets.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: They should sort that out before it gets busy.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That makes sense. Sometimes the practical details are more important than they seem at the beginning.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That is worth remembering next time too.

questions.question: What did the man dislike about the cinema?
questions.explanation: He says there were not enough staff at the entrance, causing people to wait.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a family picnic.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did the family picnic go well? || Woman: Yes, though we nearly cancelled because of the forecast. It stayed dry, and the children loved playing by the lake. [13]The only mistake was choosing a place too far from the car park, because we had to carry everything a long way[/13]. || Man: You'll know for next time. || Woman: I can understand that. It is always useful when someone explains the situation clearly before you decide what to do.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did the family picnic go well?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, though we nearly cancelled because of the forecast. It stayed dry, and the children loved playing by the lake. The only mistake was choosing a place too far from the car park, because we had to carry everything a long way.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: You'll know for next time.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I can understand that. It is always useful when someone explains the situation clearly before you decide what to do.

questions.question: What problem did the woman have at the picnic?

options.C: The picnic place was too far away.

questions.explanation: She says they chose a place too far from the car park and had to carry everything a long way.
